allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add LLamaSharp vision extraction and model download services

- Add IVisionExtractionService interface for vision-based text extraction
- Implement LLamaSharpVisionExtractionService for offline LLaVA model support
- Implement VisionExtractionService for Ollama-based Gemma 3 support
- Add ModelDownloadService for downloading GGUF models from HuggingFace
- Add TextExtractionCoordinator and ITextExtractionService for unified extraction
- Add FileRenameService for document file renaming
- Remove deprecated OcrService \(Tesseract\) in favor of vision models
- Update ControlPanelWindow with Vision AI configuration UI
- Update EnvironmentService to check vision model availability
- Update ServiceContainer with new service registrations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add llama.cpp vision service for Gemma 3 support without Ollama

- Add LlamaCppVisionService that calls llama-llava-cli directly via Process
- Add LlamaCppDownloadService to download llama.cpp binaries from GitHub
- Update ServiceContainer to register new services and support "llamacpp" provider
- Update ControlPanelWindow UI with llama.cpp configuration panel
- Supports Gemma 3 models that use SigLIP \(not supported by LLamaSharp\)
- Downloads llama.cpp binaries automatically from GitHub releases
- Runs vision models fully offline without Ollama dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
